message:
✨ Improve first-time user experience (#851)

* fix: update OAuth upgrade instructions for binary quickstart users

SetupInstructionsDialog and DemoInstallGuide told binary users to run
startup-oauth.sh which requires Go/Node.js. Changed to tell users to
add .env and re-run start.sh instead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* feat: auto-login when backend has no OAuth configured

Binary quickstart users without a .env file no longer see a misleading
login page. The backend now exposes oauth_configured in /health, and the
frontend auto-redirects to /auth/github (which creates a dev-user JWT)
when no OAuth is detected.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: reduce noisy startup warnings for fresh installs

Replace scary "Warning: Failed to..." messages with user-friendly
guidance ("No kubeconfig found — connect clusters via Settings").
AI provider warning now says "AI features disabled — add API keys".
MCP bridge warning is downgraded to informational.

Background workers (MetricsHistory, DeviceTracker, PredictionWorker)
now log cluster errors only once instead of every tick cycle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* feat: add Getting Started welcome card for empty dashboard

When no clusters are connected and not in demo mode, the dashboard
shows a Getting Started card with steps: console running (checkmark),
connect a cluster (with Settings link), and optional AI setup.
Dismissible via X button with localStorage persistence.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
